_README: TEMPLATE — VERIFY BEFORE USE. This maps each recorded channel name (a bare
physical electrode number, as it appears in the .vhdr) to a 10-20 label,
using the standard BrainProducts actiCAP 64Ch 'Standard-2' arrangement.
Physical channel 2 is the online reference and is absent from the data, so it
is intentionally not among the recorded channels. Different actiCHamp caps /
shipments can use a different ordering: confirm this against YOUR cap's
montage file before enabling preprocess.apply_montage. Getting it wrong only
corrupts spatial views (topographies / interpolation), never the decoding.
